---
title: "Assignment 1"
format: html
editor: visual
authors:
- "Friso Harff (7526946)"
- "Leander van der Waal (7180063)"
- 
- 
date: "2026-05-27"
---
```{r}
#| warning: false
# Initialization
setwd(".")
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(magrittr)
library(kableExtra)
library(pROC)
library(regclass)
library(caret)
library(GGally)

```
## Add data

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
data <- read.csv("./pokemon.csv")
View(data)
```

Explore data

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

Research question and fit

Present results
